action.reasoning: Observation: Current best IC 0.057898 (rank IC 0.059149) from ensemble of two models, but three-model ensemble dropped IC slightly (0.057731). Analysis: Adding GOSS model increased rank IC but didn't improve mean IC; overfitting still large (val IC 0.085 vs test ~0.057). A more diverse ensemble of many LightGBM models with varied hyperparameters, similar to Qlib's DoubleEnsemble, may reduce overfitting and improve generalization. Decision: Train 10 LightGBM models with random hyperparameter combinations from a broad search space, each with early stopping on daily IC. Save all to ensemble_ckpt for averaging predictions. Estimated training time ~22 min, well within remaining 1.87h. This should push IC higher.
